data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 704c9e17569e is on main, CI green (207 test files, 2370 tests pass). All acceptance criteria verified: static model catalogs provide full model lists for Claude/Codex/Gemini; stripCommonModelLabelPrefix correctly strips provider-space prefixes so pills show model names (e.g. 'Opus 4.6'); clear/unselect via X button on pills works through handleRemoveScannedOption. No regressions, no invariant violations.
